reviews.review_msg: She was the best prof I had in SFU. Explains concepts well and gave good examples.  Exams might be tough considering she emphasizes writing down every single unit but the course was overall, not too challenging if you put in the effort.
She is a great prof! If you attend class, pay attention, and stay on top of the homework you will be fine. Super helpful professor. Lectures have a lot of content but slide have lots of examples.

She tried a little too hard to be popular with the students dropping brand names and talking about trends. She isn't the best speaker but not horrible and tries hard to keep things interesting. Reasonable at explaining things.

She tried a little too hard to be popular with the students dropping brand names and talking about trends. She isn't the best speaker but not horrible and tries hard to keep things interesting.  Reasonable at explaining things.

lectures are straight forward. put in the work and you'll get a good grade. she's sassy and arrogant about her career which is really annoying (tone it down pls). exams are clear and she tells you what is on them basically.

Sure, she taught how to be succeed in personal life and she reply the email quickly. But personally, i don't like this woman, she is so pround of her career and her life.  she is impatient to response student academic question, and  exercise problem.

If you're willing to put in the effort to study and succeed in life then I HIGHLY recommend her class. Her classes are informativeengaging and she genuinely cares about her students. I really enjoyed coming to her classes because she gives a lot of life lessons and how to succeed in life. She's def. someone I aspire to become in the future.
She explains materials so well and gives you formulas she summarized for each chapter. Easy A, as long as you do the homework. It's kind of hard to fail this class if you do the work, really
She's so hot loll. Very helpful and tells you exactly what to study for from her practise questions in class. Recommended!
She might not be good at teaching the content clearly, but her exams are fair and quite easy as long as you pay attention in classes and do the assignments.

Great instructor + fair marker. She is very good at what she does, and is proud of her accomplishments- for those that actually strive to excel and be successful, don't be afraid to approach her for advice as she is very much willing to help. Just understand and practice the weekly assignments & you'll ace the exams. Highly recommended.
She goes fast and does not record her lecture, she is open to feedback and will help if you ask for it

Pros: 
 -Midterm is very easy
 -She lectures clearly and coherently 
 -She is quite attractive 
 Cons:
 -Final is very hard
 -She has very limited office hours
 -She is very sassy and can be quite condescending at times

She spends a lot of time trying to be cool, both by brand reference, and by embarrassing students (not me, so this isn't me retaliating).  Lectures are a bit fast, but she tries to keep it interesting.  Examples used in class directly relate to exam, and she does a good job pointing out what to expect on the exam.  Marking seemed fair.

Very good prof. Would recommended. First midterm is easy. The final is harder but OK. She makes her lectures interesting and focuses on what is most important. Comment that said she's not good for telling people to go home makes it sound worse than it was. She just said that because she emphasized reading that chapter since it's the most important

I recommend her because she chooses only the important questions to do for homework and not pointless ones to waste our time. She explains lectures very well. Tutorials are a MUST to attend for marks and a presentation in it. Exams are pretty fair.
She makes the lecture super interesting. She explains the material extremely well and makes it simple compared to the textbook. Great prof!

She told us to "Just go home if you didn't read the chapter on ABC costing.. you wont understand anything in lecture today" Gee, I wonder what that says about her ability to teach the material... I regret taking this class with her, she definitely gives off a sassy vibe. Would recommend you to choose another prof.
